briefdescription.para: Configure custom ISO 15765-2 network layer timeouts.

parameterdescription.para: N_Bs max timeout in milliseconds (0 = use default 1000ms).
N_Cr max timeout in milliseconds (0 = use default 1000ms).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_ISOTP_Link *link, uint32_t rx_id, uint32_t tx_id, uint8_t *rx_buf, size_t rx_buf_size, uint8_t *tx_buf, size_t tx_buf_size)
memberdef.name: syn_isotp_init

briefdescription.para: Initialize ISO-TP Link in Classic CAN mode (8-byte frames).
Initiate transmission of a multi-byte payload.

parameterdescription.para: Length of payload (1 to max buffer capacity).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, error code on busy/invalid params.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve next pending outgoing CAN frame from ISO-TP engine.

simplesect.para: true if a frame was generated, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Process an incoming CAN frame into the ISO-TP engine.
Read completed assembled message from ISO-TP receiver.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes copied, or -1 if no message ready.

briefdescription.para: Step ISO-TP timers (microseconds for fine STmin pacing).
